MENARA DEMO — PROPERTY FACTSHEET

Overview
12 Jalan Demo, Seksyen 7, 40000 Shah Alam, Selangor, Malaysia.
A 12-storey mixed-residential tower completed in 2018.

Floor layout
- Ground floor: main lobby, concierge, two retail units (convenience store, café).
- Floors 2–3: parking (48 covered bays; one bay per unit).
- Floors 4–11: residential units, 6 units per floor (48 total residences).
- Floor 12 (rooftop): communal amenities — infinity pool, gym, outdoor lounge, garden.

Unit mix
There are three residential unit types totalling 48 residences:
- 24× 2-bedroom units (approx 78 m²).
- 16× 3-bedroom units (approx 110 m²).
- 8× 3-bedroom duplexes on floors 10–11 (approx 160 m² each).

Amenities
Swimming pool (rooftop, 18m lap), gymnasium, co-working lounge, 24-hour security,
CCTV, visitor parking, landscaped garden, private shuttle to Shah Alam KTM station.

Photo captions
1. South-facing balcony view toward Seksyen 13.
2. Rooftop infinity pool at sunset.
3. Ground-floor lobby with terrazzo flooring and timber reception desk.

Additional notes
Building is served by TNB grid and has standby generator backup sized for
common areas and lifts. Water tanks serve two days of peak demand.
